module.name: CROWDAQ
module.author: CROWDAQ
module.description: Renders a live CROWDAQ sports-excitement feed on a Xibo display (score, excitement meter, last notable moment).

property.title: Event ID
property.helpText: CROWDAQ event / match identifier (e.g. worldcup-2026-semi-br-ar). If left blank the backend resolves the best available live event for this display.

property.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
property.helpText: Minimum seconds between backend pulls when the SSE stream is unavailable. SSE itself pushes in real time; this is only the fallback-polling cadence.

test.message: Refresh interval must be at least 5 seconds.

property.title: Show team logos
property.helpText: Show team crest images when the feed supplies them. Unchecked renders team abbreviations only.

property.title: Show last notable moment
property.helpText: Show the most recent notable moment text (goal, red card, VAR check, etc.) below the score line.

property.title: Moment text length (chars)
property.helpText: Maximum number of characters to render from the last-moment text. Longer strings are truncated with a trailing ellipsis.

test.message: Moment length must be a positive number.

stencil.twig:
{% if showTeamLogos %} {% endif %} Home 0 – 0 Away {% if showTeamLogos %} {% endif %}
0.0 •
{% if showLastMoment %}
Waiting for CROWDAQ feed…
{% endif %}
connecting
